name: Bobby Slayton
bio: Bobby Slayton is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer known by the nickname the Pit Bull of Comedy for his aggressive, high-energy delivery mixing insults, complaint, and personal storytelling. He emerged on the club circuit in the 1980s and has appeared on numerous television programs including The Tonight Show and HBOs Comic Relief. He had a supporting role in the 2001 film Bandits.

timeline.ev: Supporting role in the film Bandits
Frequent guest on The Adam Carolla Show

accolades: Known as The Pit Bull of Comedy
